hero.title: About DataLead
hero.subtitle: 18+ years of enterprise data management excellence.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text1: DataLead Consulting was founded with a singular vision: to help organizations transform their data into strategic investments. Over 18 years, we've grown from a specialized database consultancy into a comprehensive data solutions provider.
mission.text2: Today we serve government agencies, financial institutions, and enterprises across Azerbaijan, delivering everything from 24/7 database support to cutting-edge data lakehouse deployments with IOMETE.
mission.quote: Transform your data into investments — that's not just our tagline, it's our promise.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do.

expertise.title: Deep Expertise
expertise.desc: Certified professionals with hands-on experience across Oracle, PostgreSQL, MS-SQL, and modern data platforms.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Constantly adopting cutting-edge technologies like IOMETE, Apache Spark, and cloud-native solutions.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.desc: 100% commitment to delivering high-quality, production-ready solutions that meet enterprise standards.

partnership.title: True Partnership
partnership.desc: We work alongside our clients as trusted advisors, not just service providers.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.subtitle: Key milestones in our growth story.

y1.title: Company Founded
y1.desc: DataLead Consulting established in Baku, starting with Oracle database administration.

y2.title: Government Partnerships
y2.desc: Began serving Azerbaijan's government agencies including Tax Service and Customs Committee.

y3.title: Open Source Expansion
y3.desc: Expanded into PostgreSQL, NoSQL, and big data technologies with Cloudera and Apache.

y4.title: IOMETE Partnership
y4.desc: Became official IOMETE partner, offering modern data lakehouse solutions.
